dataset_goal: Used to optimize meeting summarization prompts and evaluate structure quality, decisions, blockers, and next steps.

how_to_use.prompt_optimization_target: Improve overview quality, reduce hallucinated decisions and blockers, and keep next steps concrete.
how_to_use.few_shot_usage: Select 1-2 train cases with stable outputs as in-context examples for the summarization prompt.

cases.title: Weekly Product Planning
optimize_for: clear decisions vs next steps separation

transcript_segments.speaker: PM
transcript_segments.text: Today we need to finalize the onboarding release plan and confirm the copy changes.

transcript_segments.speaker: Designer
transcript_segments.text: The new onboarding screens are ready, but legal still needs to review the welcome message.

transcript_segments.speaker: Engineer
transcript_segments.text: The feature flag is already prepared, and we can enable it next Tuesday.

transcript_segments.speaker: PM
transcript_segments.text: Then let's keep the release target for next Tuesday if legal approval arrives by Monday.

reference_summary.overview: The team reviewed onboarding release readiness, including UI completion, legal review, and rollout timing.
decisions: Keep the release target for next Tuesday if legal approval arrives by Monday.
blockers: Legal review of the welcome message is still pending.

cases.notes: Strong few-shot candidate for conditional decisions.

cases.title: Research Progress Check-in

transcript_segments.speaker: Lead
transcript_segments.text: We completed most of the data cleaning work this week.

transcript_segments.speaker: Member A
transcript_segments.text: The missing value issue is resolved now.

transcript_segments.speaker: Member B
transcript_segments.text: Model training is still behind because the training script is not stable yet.

transcript_segments.speaker: Lead
transcript_segments.text: Okay, let's focus on stabilizing the training script first.

reference_summary.overview: The team discussed progress on data cleaning and the remaining delay in model training.
blockers: The training script is not stable yet.

cases.notes: Useful for preventing hallucinated formal decisions.

cases.title: Incident Review and Rollback

transcript_segments.speaker: SRE
transcript_segments.text: We saw a 30 percent error spike after the payment patch went live.

transcript_segments.speaker: Engineering Manager
transcript_segments.text: Roll back the patch now and keep traffic on the previous version.

transcript_segments.speaker: Backend Engineer
transcript_segments.text: I can prepare a fixed patch by tomorrow afternoon after we isolate the timeout issue.

transcript_segments.speaker: Product Manager
transcript_segments.text: Then today's decision is rollback now and review the fixed patch tomorrow.

reference_summary.overview: The team reviewed a payment incident, decided to roll back the patch, and planned a follow-up review after a fix is prepared.
decisions: Roll back the payment patch immediately.
blockers: The timeout issue causing the error spike is not isolated yet.
next_steps: Prepare a fixed patch by tomorrow afternoon.

cases.notes: Good dev case for explicit operations decisions.

transcript_segments.speaker: PM
transcript_segments.text: We need to finalize the vendor contract timeline today.

transcript_segments.speaker: Legal
transcript_segments.text: 合同条款基本没问题，但付款条款还需要再确认一次。

transcript_segments.speaker: Operations
transcript_segments.text: If legal can clear the payment clause by Thursday, we can sign on Friday.

transcript_segments.speaker: PM
transcript_segments.text: 好，那我们先保留周五签约目标，但付款条款是当前 blocker。

reference_summary.overview: The team reviewed vendor contract timing and agreed to keep a Friday signing target while legal confirms the payment clause.
decisions: Keep Friday as the provisional signing target.
blockers: The payment clause still needs legal confirmation.
next_steps: Legal should clear the payment clause by Thursday.
